content_body: The cabin was awesome! And everyone in Blue Ridge was so amazing and nice. We visited the Benton-Mckaye Trail, visited in the swinging bridge, spent all day in downtown, and drove into both Tennessee and North Carolina. We had so much fun in the hot tub as well as playing pool, darts, and board games. It was an amazing trip and we will definitely be back.
title: An Amazing Trip and Cabin!
